subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! Hold thou fast unto this Divine Lote-Tree, lest the winds of trial that blow from every direction cast thee down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ورقه تمسکی بهذه السدره لئلا یسقطک اریاح الافتتان التی تهب من شطر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
